name: Zero Hash
description: Zero Hash — US crypto-as-a-service infrastructure enabling fintechs to embed Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoin buy/sell/transfer via API.

seo.title: Zero Hash — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Zero Hash: Zero Hash — US crypto-as-a-service infrastructure enabling fintechs to embed Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoin buy/sell/transfer via API.

when_to_use: Embedding Bitcoin and Ethereum buy/sell into US fintech apps
Stablecoin transfer infrastructure for US crypto-as-a-service
Regulated crypto on/off-ramp API for consumer fintech products

pros: Buy, sell, transfer for major assets and stables
cons: US crypto regulation uncertain and shifting
Not a payment gateway — category mismatch
review.verdict: Leading US embedded-crypto infrastructure for fintechs adding Bitcoin and stables — not really a payment gateway though.
review.best_for: US fintechs embedding crypto buy/sell/transfer into their apps without becoming regulated themselves
review.not_for: Merchants wanting to accept crypto for goods or teams outside US regulatory scope

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
